from typing import TypedDict

class UserData(TypedDict):
    id: int
    name: str
    active: bool
    role: str

def get_user_data(user_id) -> UserData:
    # Correct: use a shared TypedDict or dataclass to enforce shape consistency
    return {"id": user_id, "name": "John", "active": True, "role": "user"}

def get_admin_data(admin_id) -> UserData:
    return {"id": admin_id, "name": "Jane", "active": True, "role": "admin"}
